deleted.description: Set to true to soft-delete the playlist.

description.description: Optional description of the playlist's purpose or contents.

filters.description: JSON object with recording filter criteria. Only used when type is 'filters'. Defines which recordings match this saved filter view. When updating a filters-type playlist, you must include the existing filters alongside any other changes — omitting filters will be treated as removing them.

pinned.description: Whether this playlist is pinned to the top of the list.

type.description:
Playlist type: 'collection' for manually curated recordings, 'filters' for saved filter views. Required on create, cannot be changed after.

* `collection` - Collection
* `filters` - Filters
